steps.title: Company Identity
steps.subtitle: Who you are and what you sell

core_offering.label: What does your product/service actually do?
core_offering.placeholder: We build and deploy production AI systems for sales, ops, and back-office work...
core_offering.microcopy: Explain your main mechanism or what category you own.

best_fit_industries.label: What specific industries or verticals do you target?
best_fit_industries.placeholder: e.g., Solar installers, dental, real estate

decision_makers.label: Who holds the budget, and who uses it daily?
decision_makers.placeholder:
Buyers: CRO, VP of Sales, VP of Operations
End-Users: field sales reps, office managers

pain_points.label: What costly problems are your prospects facing before they find you?
pain_points.placeholder: Wasting money on missed calls; messy spreadsheet tracking...
pain_points.microcopy: This is what we will use to write the hooks for your cold emails.

value_proposition.label: What measurable outcomes or wins do customers get?
value_proposition.placeholder: 100+ hours saved per month; live in 4-6 weeks; flat fee...

buying_signals.label: What triggers indicate a company needs your solution right now?
buying_signals.placeholder: Aggressively hiring field sales reps; broken spreadsheet workflows...
buying_signals.microcopy: Events or indicators that make them a perfect timing-based lead.

disqualifiers.label: What makes a company a fundamentally poor fit?
disqualifiers.placeholder: Pre-revenue teams; no inbound phone motion; micro-volume with no scale intent...
disqualifiers.microcopy: Tell our AI who to exclude from your list so you don't waste data credits.
